summary: Decent soundboard capture with faint tape hiss; no specific performance highlights mentioned.
review: The recording is a soundboard source that sounds overall fine, with only a slight hiss in the quieter passages that most listeners will barely notice. Reviewers did not comment on the musical performance or setlist, so the show quality cannot be assessed from this data.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review with a zero‑star rating but text is mostly neutral/positive about audio; lack of performance info limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Minor hiss in quiet sections, otherwise clear and listenable.
